qtype: temperature calculations with negative numbers, finding difference
tex:

\newline

(b) The temperature at midday on Tuesday is 23$^\circ$C higher than the temperature at 10 pm on Monday.
\newline

Calculate the temperature at midday on Tuesday.
\newline

content.content:

\newline

\newline

The temperature at 10 pm on Monday is $-15\,^\circ\text{C}$.
\newline

The temperature at 10 pm on Monday is $-15\,^\circ\text{C}$.

\begin{parts}
\item Calculate the difference between these two temperatures.

\vgap

\AnswerLine[][$^\circ\text{C}$]
\Marks{1}

\item The temperature at midday on Tuesday is 23$^\circ$C higher than the temperature at 10 pm on Monday.

\vgap
